entorno.descLectura: Simplifies the interface and explanations for minors, older adults, or users with cognitive diversity.

HERO.DESCRIPCION: Academic platform for managing, publishing, and transferring scientific software focused on coffee and cacao production chains.

OPERACION.DESCRIPCION: The ecosystem connects university research, academic software, technical validation, and technology transfer for the agroindustrial sector.
OPERACION.PASO1_DESC: They register tools developed in academic and scientific projects.
OPERACION.PASO2_DESC: The platform organizes documentation, metrics, reviews, and publication statuses.
OPERACION.PASO3_DESC: Users consult specialized software for coffee, cacao, and artificial intelligence.
OPERACION.PASO4_DESC: The results support technical decisions and strengthen knowledge transfer.

LINEAS.DESCRIPCION: AgroCastillo organizes its tools around strategic areas for regional agroindustrial development.

HERRAMIENTAS.DESCRIPCION: Applications with high consultation levels, technical documentation, and direct relation to agroindustrial processes.

FLUJO.DESCRIPCION: From data capture to tool publication, AgroCastillo structures the life cycle of academic software.

HEADER.DESCRIPCION: Academic directory of researchers linked to the AgroCastillo ecosystem, organized by focus lines, scientific production, and areas of specialization.

FILTROS.BUSQUEDA_PLACEHOLDER: Search by name, email, keyword, or research line

EMPTY.DESCRIPCION: Adjust the search term or select another focus line to expand the results.

COMUNIDAD.DESCRIPCION: Exchange findings, methodologies, and results with researchers in the agro-industrial sector.
COMUNIDAD.REGLAS_TEXTO: Maintain academic respect, cite your sources, and encourage technical exchange among researchers.
COMUNIDAD.PLACEHOLDER_TITULO: E.g. Validation of predictive models for crops...
COMUNIDAD.PLACEHOLDER_CONTENIDO: Describe the context, methodology, or result you want to discuss...

CONTACTO.DESCRIPCION: We connect technological development centers, independent researchers, and productive Coffee and Cacao projects.
CONTACTO.HORARIO_TEXTO: Monday to Friday: 8:00 AM - 12:00 PM / 2:00 PM - 6:00 PM
CONTACTO.COOPERACION_TEXTO: Open to Soil Laboratories, Biotechnology Centers, and R&D&i research groups.
CONTACTO.SOPORTE_TEXTO: Priority support for API integration, customized subareas, and Machine Learning model deployment.
CONTACTO.FORM_DESCRIPCION: Complete the form and the platform will process your support request or research proposal directly to our instant messaging line.
CONTACTO.MENSAJE_PLACEHOLDER: Describe the requirements or project description related to Coffee or Cacao...

LOGIN.O_CORREO: or sign in with your email

REGISTRO.EXITO_MENSAJE: Your AgroCastillo account has been successfully registered.
REGISTRO.GOOGLE_ARIA: Register with Google using AgroCastillo backend
REGISTRO.ERROR_PASSWORD_PATTERN: Must include at least one uppercase letter and one number.
REGISTRO.ERROR_TERMINOS: You must accept the terms to continue.
